language.comment: Default interface language: fr or en.

github_url.comment: Footer link to the MAAT project repository.

license_url.comment: Footer link to the software license.

developer_name.comment: Developer name displayed in the footer.

developer_mail.comment: Developer email address used by the footer mail link.

app_title.comment: Application title displayed in the web interface and generated documents.

active_project.comment: Path to the active MAAT project directory.

listen_host.comment: Network interface on which the Flask server listens.

listen_port.comment: TCP port on which the Flask server listens.

public_url.comment: Public URL shown to users and in server summaries.

admin_token.comment: Secret key required to open the administration page.

random_seed.comment: Seed used to generate stable student tokens and symbols; independent of the academic year.

bind_token_to_first_client.comment: Bind each token to the first client fingerprint that submits with it.

client_ip_header.comment: Trusted reverse-proxy header for the client IP, or empty for remote_addr.

fingerprint_uses_user_agent.comment: Include the browser User-Agent in the client fingerprint.

automatic_parallel_settings.comment: If true, ./manage-maat.sh install auto-tunes queue, Docker, build and execution parallelism from /proc/cpuinfo.

bind_mode.comment: Use staging for NAS-safe Docker mounts or direct for direct bind mounts.

staging_root.comment: Local directory used for temporary Docker-visible run copies.

staging_cleanup_max_age_hours.comment: Maximum age in hours for stale Docker staging directories before automatic cleanup.

container_user.comment: Non-root UID:GID used inside Docker containers, even when MAAT itself runs as root.

container_home.comment: HOME directory exported inside Docker containers.

network.comment: Docker network mode used for build and run containers.

cap_drop_all.comment: Drop all Linux capabilities from Docker containers.

no_new_privileges.comment: Prevent privilege escalation inside Docker containers.

read_only_root_filesystem.comment: Run Docker containers with a read-only root filesystem.

tmpfs.comment: Temporary in-memory filesystems mounted inside Docker containers.

input_mount_read_only.comment: Mount project data read-only during execution when possible.

default_cpus.comment: Fallback CPU quota for Docker commands.

default_memory.comment: Fallback memory limit for Docker commands.

default_pids_limit.comment: Fallback process-count limit for Docker commands.

watch_interval_minutes.comment: Interval in minutes between public tunnel URL checks.

watch_url_timeout_seconds.comment: Timeout in seconds used when checking whether the public tunnel URL is reachable.

notifications_enabled.comment: Enable ntfy notifications for tunnel status changes.

ntfy_server.comment: ntfy server used to send tunnel notifications.

ntfy_topic.comment: ntfy topic receiving notifications on a phone.
